response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role explicitly requires 8+ years of C++ and 5+ years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only a brief early-career stint writing C/C++ at National Instruments (~6 months in 2000-2001) and a C++ bachelor thesis; primary stacks are TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/GIS work. No evidence of leading an internal cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture at the required scale.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career with full-stack and systems exposure across multiple languages
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching track record (workshops, dojos, Selenium course, talks)
Founder-level ownership of open-source platforms (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts) showing architectural initiative
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement — only minor early C/C++ exposure on the resume
No demonstrated experience building or leading a large-scale internal cloud compute platform or distributed compute infrastructure
Career emphasis is web/full-stack/DLang rather than systems-level cloud compute, storage, or hardware architecture

key_factors.factor: Lack of large-scale cloud compute platform experience
Mentoring and technical leadership track record
